records.question: What locations in Sacramento have the name Sac State American River Courtyard and the street address 6000 J St?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT location.locationid FROM location
WHERE location.city = 'Sacramento' AND location.locationname = 'Sac State American River Courtyard' AND location.streetaddress = '6000 J St'
records.pred_sql: SELECT location.LocationID FROM location WHERE location.LocationName = 'Sac State American River Courtyard' AND location.StreetAddress = '6000 J St' AND location.City = 'Sacramento'

records.question: Which locations named Sac State Union are in Sacramento with a street address of 6000 J St, latitude 38.559615, longitude -121.42243, and have rootbeer purchased on or before 2015-02-24?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT location.locationid FROM location
JOIN geolocation ON location.locationid = geolocation.locationid
JOIN rootbeer ON location.locationid = rootbeer.locationid
WHERE location.locationname = 'Sac State Union' AND rootbeer.purchasedate <= '2015-02-24' AND location.streetaddress = '6000 J St' AND geolocation.latitude = 38.559615 AND geolocation.longitude = -121.42243 AND location.city = 'Sacramento'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT location.LocationID
FROM location
JOIN rootbeer ON location.LocationID = rootbeer.LocationID
JOIN "transaction" ON rootbeer.RootBeerID = "transaction".RootBeerID
WHERE location.LocationName = 'Sac State Union'
  AND location.City = 'Sacramento'
  AND location.StreetAddress = '6000 J St'
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM geolocation
      WHERE geolocation.LocationID = location.LocationID
        AND geolocation.Latitude = 38.559615
        AND geolocation.Longitude = -121.42243
  )
  AND "transaction".TransactionDate <= '2015-02-24'
